title: tonningia polyrhiza
intro: Tonningia polyrhiza, also known as Guduchi or Amrita, is a climbing shrub native to tropical regions of Asia and is a member of the Celastraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Tonningia polyrhiza has been used to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory tract infections, providing various health benefits to those who consume it. Herbal preparations of Tonningia polyrhiza include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or supplements for its medicinal and health-promoting effects.
